title.en: The Annexes: PICS, MIBs, Regulatory Tables and Informative References
title.zh: 附录：PICS、MIB、法规表与参考资料

blocks.en: After the numbered clauses, IEEE 802.11-2024 closes with 31 annexes, lettered A through AE (the alphabet runs out, so it wraps to double letters AA-AE). They fall into two kinds. Normative annexes are part of the requirements: if you claim conformance, you must satisfy them. Informative annexes are help text — worked examples, reference implementations, and background explanation that clarify the main body without adding new obligations. This lesson is a map: it tells you what each annex is for and when you would turn to it.
blocks.zh: 在带编号的正文条款之后，IEEE 802.11-2024 以 31 个附录收尾，编号从 A 到 AE（字母表用完后改用双字母 AA 到 AE）。它们分为两类。规范性（normative）附录属于强制要求的一部分：若要声称符合标准，就必须满足它们。资料性（informative）附录则是辅助说明——给出实例、参考实现和背景解释，用以澄清正文，但不引入新的义务。本课是一张地图：告诉你每个附录的用途，以及何时该去查阅它。

blocks.en: Quick test for which kind you are reading: open the annex and look at the line under its letter. It says either '(normative)' or '(informative)'. Of the 31 annexes, only six are normative — B, C, D, E, F, and H — and they are the ones a conformance lab actually checks. Everything else exists to teach and to give worked examples.
blocks.zh: 判断你正在读哪一类的快捷方法：打开附录，看其字母下方的一行字，上面写着“(normative)（规范性）”或“(informative)（资料性）”。在 31 个附录中，只有六个是规范性的——B、C、D、E、F、H——它们才是一致性测试实验室真正会核查的对象。其余附录都是为了讲解和提供实例而存在。

blocks.en: The six normative annexes carry real conformance weight. Annex B is the PICS proforma — a giant checklist of every protocol feature where an implementer ticks 'supported / not supported', producing a precise statement of what a product does. Annex C is the ASN.1 encoding of the MAC and PHY MIB, the formal machine-readable definition of every managed object that network management tools read and set. Annex D lists the regulatory references (the national and regional radio rules each country imposes). Annex E defines country elements and operating classes — the lookup tables that map a country code plus an operating class to the exact channels, bandwidths and power limits a device may legally use. Annex F holds the HT LDPC matrix definitions (the parity-check matrices for the error-correcting code), and Annex H specifies the usage of EtherType 89-0d for tunnelling 802.11 management frames over a wired link.
blocks.zh: 六个规范性附录承载着真正的一致性约束。附录 B 是 PICS 形式表（PICS proforma）——一份涵盖每一项协议特性的巨型清单，实现者在其中逐项勾选“支持／不支持”，从而精确说明某产品的实际能力。附录 C 是 MAC 与 PHY MIB 的 ASN.1 编码，即每个受管对象的、机器可读的正式定义，网络管理工具据此读取和设置参数。附录 D 列出法规参考（各国和各地区强制施加的无线电规则）。附录 E 定义国家元素（country element）与操作类（operating class）——这组查找表将“国家代码 + 操作类”映射到设备可合法使用的确切信道、带宽和功率上限。附录 F 收录 HT LDPC 矩阵定义（纠错码的校验矩阵），附录 H 则规定 EtherType 89-0d 的用法，用于在有线链路上隧道传输 802.11 管理帧。

blocks.en:
graph TD
  STD[802.11-2024 annexes] --> NORM[Normative: must comply]
  STD --> INFO[Informative: guidance only]
  NORM --> B[B PICS proforma]
  NORM --> C[C ASN.1 MIB]
  NORM --> D[D Regulatory refs]
  NORM --> E[E Operating classes]
  NORM --> F[F HT LDPC]
  NORM --> H[H EtherType 89-0d]
  INFO --> EX[Worked examples and background A G I-AE]
blocks.zh:
graph TD
  STD[802.11-2024 附录] --> NORM[规范性：必须符合]
  STD --> INFO[资料性：仅供参考]
  NORM --> B[B PICS 形式表]
  NORM --> C[C ASN.1 MIB]
  NORM --> D[D 法规参考]
  NORM --> E[E 操作类]
  NORM --> F[F HT LDPC]
  NORM --> H[H EtherType 89-0d]
  INFO --> EX[实例与背景 A G I-AE]

blocks.en: The remaining 25 annexes are informative. They are where the standard slows down and shows its work: full byte-by-byte encoding examples, reference algorithms you can compare your implementation against, and prose that explains how a feature is meant to be used. When a clause in the main body feels abstract, an informative annex is often the place that makes it concrete. They never add a requirement, but they are frequently the fastest way to understand one.
blocks.zh: 其余 25 个附录都是资料性的。它们是标准放慢节奏、把推导过程摊开来展示的地方：完整的逐字节编码实例、可供你与自己实现逐位对照的参考算法，以及解释某项特性预期如何使用的说明文字。当正文中的某个条款显得抽象时，资料性附录往往正是把它讲具体的地方。它们从不新增要求，却常常是理解某项要求的最快途径。

blocks.en: A handy way to use the informative annexes: when you are debugging an encoding, jump to Annex I (frame encoding examples) or Annex L (TIM partial virtual bitmap sample code) and check your bytes against theirs. When you are implementing security, Annex J gives RSNA reference implementations and test vectors you can run your code against. Matching the published vectors is the cheapest correctness check you have.
blocks.zh: 使用资料性附录的一个实用技巧：当你在调试编码时，可跳到附录 I（帧编码实例）或附录 L（TIM 部分虚拟位图的示例代码），把你的字节与它给出的字节逐一比对。当你在实现安全机制时，附录 J 提供了 RSNA 参考实现与测试向量，你可以用它来检验自己的代码。与已发布的向量对得上，是你能用的最廉价的正确性检查。

summary.en: Coverage map: all 31 annexes A-AE, what each is for
summary.zh: 覆盖地图：全部 31 个附录 A–AE 及各自用途

blocks.en:
Normative (six): Annex B — PICS proforma, the feature-support conformance checklist. Annex C — ASN.1 encoding of the MAC and PHY MIB (managed-object definitions). Annex D — Regulatory references. Annex E — Country elements and operating classes (channel/bandwidth/power tables). Annex F — HT LDPC matrix definitions. Annex H — Usage of EtherType 89-0d.

Informative (twenty-five): Annex A — Bibliography (cited resources). Annex G — Frame exchange sequences (notation and example handshakes). Annex I — Examples of encoding a frame for OFDM, DMG and EDMG PHYs. Annex J — RSNA reference implementations and test vectors. Annex K — TSPECs and admission control. Annex L — Examples and sample code for encoding a TIM Partial Virtual Bitmap. Annex M — EPD and LPD headers and the integration function. Annex N — AP functional description. Annex O — Additional HT, VHT, and S1G information. Annex P — Location and Time Difference accuracy test. Annex Q — Example use of the Destination URI for Event and Diagnostic Reports. Annex R — Interworking with external networks. Annex S — Mesh BSS operation. Annex T — Overlapping BSS (OBSS) management. Annex U — Functions of the centralized coordination service root (CCSR). Annex V — Informative procedures for DMG STAs. Annex W — Informative procedures for CDMG STAs. Annex X — Link rate considerations. Annex Y — Preassociation discovery (PAD) additional information. Annex Z — HE-SIG-B content examples. Annex AA — Multiple BSSID configuration examples. Annex AB — Radar implementation using the DMG PHY and EDMG PHY. Annex AC — Examples of WUR OOK symbol design and CSD design using MC-OOK modulation. Annex AD — Phase shift feedback calculation. Annex AE — SIR-based attack detection.
blocks.zh:
规范性（六个）：附录 B——PICS 形式表，特性支持一致性清单。附录 C——MAC 与 PHY MIB 的 ASN.1 编码（受管对象定义）。附录 D——法规参考。附录 E——国家元素与操作类（信道／带宽／功率表）。附录 F——HT LDPC 矩阵定义。附录 H——EtherType 89-0d 的用法。

资料性（二十五个）：附录 A——参考文献（引用资源）。附录 G——帧交换序列（记法与握手示例）。附录 I——为 OFDM、DMG 与 EDMG PHY 编码帧的实例。附录 J——RSNA 参考实现与测试向量。附录 K——TSPEC 与接纳控制。附录 L——TIM 部分虚拟位图编码的实例与示例代码。附录 M——EPD 与 LPD 报头及集成功能。附录 N——AP 功能描述。附录 O——附加的 HT、VHT 与 S1G 信息。附录 P——定位与时间差精度测试。附录 Q——事件与诊断报告中目的 URI 的使用示例。附录 R——与外部网络的互通。附录 S——网状（Mesh）BSS 操作。附录 T——重叠 BSS（OBSS）管理。附录 U——集中协调服务根（CCSR）的功能。附录 V——DMG STA 的资料性流程。附录 W——CDMG STA 的资料性流程。附录 X——链路速率考量。附录 Y——预关联发现（PAD）附加信息。附录 Z——HE-SIG-B 内容示例。附录 AA——多 BSSID 配置示例。附录 AB——使用 DMG PHY 与 EDMG PHY 实现雷达。附录 AC——使用 MC-OOK 调制的 WUR OOK 符号设计与 CSD 设计示例。附录 AD——相移反馈计算。附录 AE——基于 SIR 的攻击检测。

blocks.en: Notice how the informative annexes cluster by topic area. Several support specific PHYs and BSS types: Annex O adds HT/VHT/S1G detail, Annex Z gives HE-SIG-B content examples, Annex AC covers Wake-Up Radio (WUR) symbol design, and Annexes V, W and AB document DMG/CDMG/EDMG (the 60 GHz millimetre-wave family), including using those PHYs as a radar. Others target services and topologies: Annex K (TSPECs and admission control for QoS), Annex N (how an AP functions), Annex R (interworking with external networks), Annex S (mesh), Annex T (managing overlapping BSSs), and Annex U (the centralized coordination service root). A third group covers measurement and discovery: Annex P (location/time accuracy), Annex Q (diagnostic-report URIs), Annex Y (preassociation discovery), Annex X (link-rate considerations), and the phase-shift/security pair Annex AD and Annex AE.
blocks.zh: 请留意资料性附录是如何按主题领域聚集的。其中几个支撑特定的 PHY 与 BSS 类型：附录 O 补充 HT/VHT/S1G 细节，附录 Z 给出 HE-SIG-B 内容示例，附录 AC 涉及唤醒无线电（WUR）的符号设计，而附录 V、W 与 AB 记录 DMG/CDMG/EDMG（60 GHz 毫米波系列），其中还包括用这些 PHY 来实现雷达。另一些针对服务与拓扑：附录 K（面向 QoS 的 TSPEC 与接纳控制）、附录 N（AP 如何工作）、附录 R（与外部网络互通）、附录 S（网状网）、附录 T（重叠 BSS 管理）和附录 U（集中协调服务根）。还有一组涵盖测量与发现：附录 P（定位／时间精度）、附录 Q（诊断报告 URI）、附录 Y（预关联发现）、附录 X（链路速率考量），以及相移／安全这一对——附录 AD 与附录 AE。

blocks.en: Two annexes worth remembering even if you read nothing else. Annex A (Bibliography) is the master list of every external document the standard cites, so it is your gateway to RFCs, other IEEE standards, and regulatory texts. Annex G (Frame exchange sequences) defines the compact notation the rest of the standard uses to describe handshakes, so reading it once makes the main body far easier to parse.
blocks.zh: 有两个附录即便你别的都不读也值得记住。附录 A（参考文献）是标准所引用的每一份外部文档的总清单，因此它是你通往 RFC、其他 IEEE 标准与法规文本的入口。附录 G（帧交换序列）定义了标准其余部分用来描述握手的那套紧凑记法，读过一遍后，正文会变得容易理解得多。

blocks.en: Put together, the annexes are the standard's reference shelf. The normative six (B, C, D, E, F, H) tell a conformance lab and a regulator exactly what must be true. The informative twenty-five turn dense clauses into runnable examples and clear background. You rarely read an annex front to back; instead you jump to the one that matches the problem in front of you — a PICS table to declare a feature, an operating-class lookup to pick a legal channel, a test vector to verify your crypto, or an encoding example to debug a frame. Knowing which annex holds what is most of the skill.
blocks.zh: 合起来看，这些附录就是标准的参考书架。规范性的六个（B、C、D、E、F、H）明确告诉一致性实验室和监管机构哪些事项必须成立。资料性的二十五个则把密集的条款转化为可运行的实例与清晰的背景。你很少从头到尾读完一个附录；相反，你会直接跳到与眼前问题相匹配的那一个——用 PICS 表声明某项特性、用操作类查表选出合法信道、用测试向量校验你的加密实现，或用编码实例调试一帧。知道哪个附录装着什么，本身就是大半的本事。

cites.note: Annex A (Bibliography), B (PICS proforma), C (ASN.1 MIB), D (Regulatory references), E (Country elements and operating classes), F (HT LDPC matrix definitions), H (EtherType 89-0d), I (frame encoding examples) — titles and normative/informative labels verified.
Annex U (CCSR functions), V (DMG STA procedures), AD (Phase shift feedback calculation), AE (SIR-based attack detection) — titles verified on-page.
